title: lychnophora heterotheca
intro: Lychnophora heterotheca is a flowering plant native to Brazil, commonly known as 'cabo frio dune sage' or 'cabo frio lavender'. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's essential oil and extracts have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relaxation. Lychnophora heterotheca can be prepared as teas, infusions, or topical creams, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
